　　　　　  约翰·米尔斯 John Mills
　　　　　  范·强生 Van Johnson

◎简　　介  

　　The novel focuses on Maurice Bendrix, a rising writer during the Second World War in London, and Sarah Miles, the wife of an impotent civil servant. Bendrix is based on Greene himself, and he reflects often on the act of writing a novel. Sarah is based on Greene's lover at the time, Catherine Walston, to whom the book is dedicated.Bendrix and Sarah fall in love quickly, but he...
